nodalDepartmentName.label: Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Divisional Tripartite Competition" was launched by the Department of Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to promote theatrical arts and drama performances across the state by organizing competitive events at divisional and state levels, encouraging cultural participation and excellence in dramatic arts among youth and theatre organizations. The scheme is implemented by the Department of Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities, Government of Gujarat. The applications for this scheme are accepted Online.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - The first prize winner of the drama competition will receive a cash prize of ₹3,000/-. - The second prize winner will receive a cash prize of ₹2,500/-. - The third prize winner will receive a cash prize of ₹2,000/-. - The participating organization will receive cash prizes based on their ranking. - The first prize winning organization will receive ₹10,000/-. - The second prize winning organization will receive ₹7,000/-. - The third prize winning organization will receive ₹5,000/-. _*The first and second prize winners of the divisional tri-series drama competition also become eligible to participate at the state level competition._ _*The mode and frequency of benefit disbursement details are not specified in the provided reference material._
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote theatrical arts and drama performances across Gujarat by organizing competitive events at divisional and state levels. Individual performers and theatre organizations receive cash prizes based on their performance rankings in state-level competitions.

children.text: The scheme "Divisional Tripartite Competition" was launched by the Department of Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities, Government of Gujarat. The scheme aims to promote theatrical arts and drama performances across the state by organizing competitive events at divisional and state levels, encouraging cultural participation and excellence in dramatic arts among youth and theatre organizations. The scheme is implemented by the Department of Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities, Government of Gujarat. The applications for this scheme are accepted Online.
The first prize winner of the drama competition will receive a cash prize of ₹3,000/-.
The second prize winner will receive a cash prize of ₹2,500/-.
The third prize winner will receive a cash prize of ₹2,000/-.
The participating organization will receive cash prizes based on their ranking.
The first prize winning organization will receive ₹10,000/-.
The second prize winning organization will receive ₹7,000/-.
The third prize winning organization will receive ₹5,000/-.
*The first and second prize winners of the divisional tri-series drama competition also become eligible to participate at the state level competition.
*The mode and frequency of benefit disbursement details are not specified in the provided reference material.
Visit the official website of the Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy at
. If required, register on the website by providing the mandatory details. Verify your Email ID and Mobile Number via OTP.

Login to the website and navigate to the online application form of the scheme. In the form, fill in all the mandatory fields and upload all the mandatory documents in the specified format and size. Ensure that all documents are clear, legible, and in the accepted file format before uploading.

Carefully review all the information provided and the documents uploaded. Make any necessary corrections. Acknowledge and agree to the terms and conditions or declaration (if any) by ticking the designated checkbox. Click the "Submit" to submit your application. You'll receive a confirmation message. Note down the application reference number for future correspondence.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** Visit the official website of the Gujarat State Sangeet Natak Academy at [https://sangeetnatak.gujarat.gov.in/](https://sangeetnatak.gujarat.gov.in/). If required, register on the website by providing the mandatory details. Verify your Email ID and Mobile Number via OTP.
**Step 2:** Login to the website and navigate to the online application form of the scheme. In the form, fill in all the mandatory fields and upload all the mandatory documents in the specified format and size. Ensure that all documents are clear, legible, and in the accepted file format before uploading.
**Step 3:** Carefully review all the information provided and the documents uploaded. Make any necessary corrections. Acknowledge and agree to the terms and conditions or declaration (if any) by ticking the designated checkbox. Click the "Submit" to submit your application. You'll receive a confirmation message. Note down the application reference number for future correspondence.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.

children.text: The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat.
